description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a sleek, aerodynamic body primarily finished in matte black and metallic gray. It features four extended arms, each supporting a single rotor with two-blade propellers, arranged in a classic X configuration. The central body houses a visibly mounted camera gimbal at the front, suggesting capabilities for aerial photography or surveillance. The landing gear consists of four fixed legs, providing stable support when the drone is on the ground. The surface appears hard and smooth, with subtle venting details on the sides for cooling. No propeller guards are present, giving the drone a streamlined and professional appearance suitable for urban aerial operations.
description: A sleek quadcopter drone with four rotors, a front-mounted camera, and fixed landing legs, finished in matte black and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera gimbal, all four rotors, and the streamlined body.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the side vent, rear arms, and the absence of propeller guards.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the symmetrical arm layout and the rear of the drone's body.
description_view_3: Rear-side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the side vent and rear structure.
